title: RunnerDocument
description: The Azure Cosmos DB document shape for a runner registration: the canonical registration JSON (base64) plus a queryable last-seen timestamp and a projected list of hosted versions for the hosting index.

id.description: The runner id (also the partition key).

lastSeenAt.description: The most recent heartbeat, Unix milliseconds.

doc.description: The canonical registration JSON bytes, base64-encoded.

loadedVersions.description: The (baseWorkflowId, versionNumber) pairs the runner hosts with the version loaded.
